headline: Reblozyl Phase 2 Success Shapes Bristol Myers Squibb Valuation Story
summary: Bristol-Myers Squibb (NYSE:BMY) reported positive top-line Phase 2 results for Reblozyl in Alpha-Thalassemia related anemia. The study included both non transfusion dependent and transfusion dependent Alpha-Thalassemia patients. Primary and key secondary endpoints were met, with improvements in hemoglobin levels and reduced transfusion burden. Safety findings were consistent with previously reported data for Reblozyl. Bristol-Myers Squibb is a large biopharmaceutical company focused on...
